products.name: Berkey Water Filter
products.whyItsClean: Removes 200+ contaminants including chlorine, fluoride, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, and bacteria without electricity or complex plumbing.
products.replaces: Plastic Brita filters, single-use plastic water bottles

products.name: Clearly Filtered Pitcher
products.whyItsClean: Certified to remove 365+ contaminants including PFAS, lead, and chlorine. BPA-free Tritan plastic construction.
products.replaces: Standard Brita or PUR pitchers with limited filtration

products.name: Jolie Filtered Showerhead
products.whyItsClean: Filters chlorine, chloramine, and heavy metals from shower water — protecting skin and hair from harsh chemical exposure daily.
products.replaces: Standard unfiltered showerheads

products.name: AquaTrue RO System
products.whyItsClean: 4-stage reverse osmosis removes up to 99.99% of contaminants including arsenic, nitrates, and PFAS. No installation required.
products.replaces: Under-sink systems requiring plumber, bottled water delivery

products.name: Zero Water Pitcher
products.whyItsClean: 5-stage filtration reaches 000 ppm dissolved solids — the only pour-through certified to NSF/ANSI 53 for chromium and lead reduction.
products.replaces: Unfiltered tap water and basic carbon-only pitchers

products.name: Still Water Well
products.whyItsClean: A handcrafted ceramic water filter designed for clean, mineral rich drinking water. Powered by our pleated filter with NSF certified carbon and advanced nanofiber technology, the Stillwater Well is third party tested to reduce over 200 contaminants while retaining beneficial minerals.
products.replaces: Unfiltered tap water and basic carbon-only pitchers

products.name: Bee's Wrap Reusable Wraps
products.whyItsClean: Made from organic cotton, beeswax, jojoba oil, and tree resin. Completely plastic-free, compostable, and reusable for up to a year.
products.replaces: Plastic cling wrap (Saran Wrap), plastic bags

products.name: Lodge Cast Iron Skillet
products.whyItsClean: 100% natural iron with no synthetic coatings, PFOA, PTFE, or Teflon. Seasoned with natural oil. Lasts generations with proper care.
products.replaces: Non-stick Teflon pans which leach PFAS at high heat

products.name: Weck Glass Canning Jars
products.whyItsClean: 100% borosilicate glass with rubber gaskets — no plastic, no BPA, no leaching. Safe for fridge, freezer, oven, and dishwasher.
products.replaces: Plastic Tupperware, plastic-lidded containers

products.name: Bambu Organic Utensil Set
products.whyItsClean: Certified organic bamboo with no plastic, no synthetic dyes, and no chemical finish. Naturally antimicrobial.
products.replaces: Plastic spatulas, nylon cooking utensils

products.name: Full Circle Dish Brush
products.whyItsClean: Bamboo handle with plant-based bristles. Replaces plastic dish brushes that shed microplastics into your water and food.
products.replaces: Plastic dish brushes, synthetic sponges

products.name: Stasher Silicone Bags
products.whyItsClean: 100% pure platinum silicone — no BPA, BPS, or plastic. Reusable, dishwasher-safe, and oven-safe up to 400°F.
products.replaces: Single-use Ziploc plastic bags

products.name: Earlywood Hardwood Spoons
products.whyItsClean: Hand-crafted from hardwoods with food-safe oil finish. No varnish, no stain, no synthetic coating. Naturally antimicrobial.
products.replaces: Plastic or nylon spoons that scratch pans and degrade over time

products.name: Innersense Hydrating Shampoo
products.whyItsClean: Free of sulfates, parabens, phthalates, and synthetic fragrance. EWG Verified, USDA Certified Biobased. Safe for color-treated hair.
products.replaces: Conventional shampoos with SLS, parabens, and synthetic fragrance

products.name: Dr. Bronner's Pure-Castile Bar
products.whyItsClean: Made with organic and fair-trade ingredients. No synthetic preservatives, detergents, or foaming agents. Packaged in recycled paper.
products.replaces: Conventional liquid soap in plastic bottles with synthetic surfactants

products.name: Bite Toothpaste Bits
products.whyItsClean: Zero-waste toothpaste tablets. No plastic tube, no SLS, no artificial sweeteners. Glass bottle refillable subscription.
products.replaces: Conventional toothpaste in plastic tubes with SLS and microbeads

products.name: Who Gives A Crap TP
products.whyItsClean: 100% recycled or bamboo fibers. No inks, dyes, or scents. Wrapped in paper not plastic. 50% of profits to sanitation charities.
products.replaces: Virgin-pulp toilet paper in plastic wrapping with synthetic fragrances

products.name: Ursa Major Face Cleanser
products.whyItsClean: No parabens, sulfates, silicones, synthetic fragrance, or PEGs. Formulated with aloe, willow bark, and plant-based actives.
products.replaces: Conventional face washes with synthetic preservatives and artificial fragrance

products.name: Ethique Shampoo Bar
products.whyItsClean: Concentrated solid shampoo bar — no water, no plastic bottle, no SLS. One bar equals 3 bottles of liquid shampoo.
products.replaces: Liquid shampoo in plastic bottles with sulfates and parabens

products.name: Georganics Oil Pulling Mouthwash
products.whyItsClean: Coconut oil-based mouthwash with no alcohol, no fluoride, no synthetic flavors. Comes in glass jar with no plastic waste.
products.replaces: Alcohol-based mouthwash with artificial dyes, sweeteners, and plastic bottles

products.name: Cultiver Linen Sheet Set
products.whyItsClean: 100% European flax linen, OEKO-TEX certified. No synthetic dyes, no polyester blends, no chemical softeners. Naturally temperature-regulating.
products.replaces: Polyester-blend or chemically treated cotton sheets

products.name: Avocado Organic Wool Blanket

products.replaces: Synthetic fleece blankets or chemically treated wool

products.name: Saatva Organic Cotton Pillow

products.replaces: Polyester-fill pillows and memory foam pillows with VOC off-gassing

products.name: Coyuchi Organic Duvet Cover

products.name: Meliora Laundry Powder

products.name: Branch Basics Concentrate

products.name: Dropps Laundry Pods

products.name: Pact Organic Cotton Tee
